contact_details.formatted_text: Pinyjwok Amum | pjamum@gmail.com | 0431-191-158 | Melbourne, VIC | linkedin.com/pinyjwok-amum

profile_paragraph.formatted_text: Computer Science graduate from Deakin University with 4 years of hands-on experience building software systems and leading technical projects. As Lead Developer of a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system, architected a server-side routing engine managing **16 specialised agents** and reduced research-phase token usage by **60%** through targeted API integration. Brings strong foundations in software design, development, and testing — validated through full-stack project work, structured technical instruction, and cross-functional collaboration with senior engineering consultants. AWS-experienced with practical exposure to cloud-ready architecture and parallel execution design. Eager to contribute these skills to DXC Technology's Graduate Program (Software Engineering) and accelerate growth toward enterprise-scale delivery.
strengths_highlighted: Strong foundational knowledge in software design, development, and testing methodologies.
Design, develop, test, and evaluate IT software components.
Collaborate with senior leaders and cross-functional teams in a virtual-first environment.
